title: Diagnose and repair heavy vehicle hydraulic and air over hydraulic braking systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose and repair heavy vehicle hydraulic and air over hydraulic braking systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to diagnose and repair heavy vehicle hydraulic and air over hydraulic braking system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Diagnostic information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Diagnostic options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Diagnostic tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Diagnostic information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Diagnostic options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Diagnostic tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Diagnostic information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Diagnostic options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Diagnostic tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to diagnose and repair heavy vehicle hydraulic and air over hydraulic braking system

elements.title: Diagnose braking system

pcs.text: Diagnostic tests are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Faults are identified from diagnostic test results and causes of faults are determined2.3 Diagnosis findings, including recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments, are reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Diagnostic tests are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Faults are identified from diagnostic test results and causes of faults are determined2.3 Diagnosis findings, including recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments, are reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Diagnostic tests are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Faults are identified from diagnostic test results and causes of faults are determined2.3 Diagnosis findings, including recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments, are reported according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Diagnose braking system

elements.title: Repair braking system

pcs.text: Repair information is sourced and interpreted3.2 Repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.3 Repair tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked according to manufacturer procedures3.4 Repairs and component replacements and adjustments are carried out according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.5 Post-repair testing is carried out according to workplace procedures to confirm fault rectification, and any further problems detected as having been introduced during the repair process are rectified
